description_long: This is an adult human male figure lying flat on his back with arms and legs slightly spread apart. He is dressed in a short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted pants, with no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's hands are open and relaxed, and his feet are bare, showing detailed toes and soles. The head is bald, with defined facial features and a neutral expression. The clothing fits closely to the body, accentuating the natural contours and musculature. The overall appearance is casual and realistic, suitable for urban or everyday scenarios.
description: A bald adult male figure lying on his back, wearing a short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted pants, barefoot and relaxed.
description_view_0: View from the feet towards the head, showing the soles, spread arms, and the front of the torso.
description_view_1: Side profile from the left, highlighting the relaxed posture, facial features, and the outline of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: View from above the head, showing the top of the head, shoulders, and the spread of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Side profile from the right, similar to view 1 but mirrored, showing the body outline and relaxed limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: lying flat on back with arms and legs slightly spread
